title: Coherent (COHR) Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates

title: Coherent Corp. Reports Fiscal 2023 First Quarter Results
text: PITTSBURGH, Nov. 09, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Coherent Corp. (Nasdaq:COHR) (“Coherent,” “We” or the “Company”) today reported results for its fiscal 2023 first quarter ended September 30, 2022.
